data.title: Infrared to Operate as Validator for Greenlane's Digital Asset Vault
data.description: Infrared, a staking protocol within the Berachain ecosystem, has announced its role as a validator operator for Greenlane's digital asset vault. According to Foresight News, a portion of the BERA tokens accumulated by the vault will be staked using Infrared's infrastructure, generating revenue through its validators. Greenlane plans to deploy up to 30 million BERA tokens to support validator operations on the Berachain network. Initially, Greenlane will join Infrared's validator pool with two validators.

data.title: Meta trials new paid subscriptions across Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp
data.description:
Meta announced Monday it will begin testing new paid subscription options across its major platforms in the coming months. Users will get access to enhanced features and artificial intelligence tools while basic services stay free. The social media company said that subscribers can access features designed to boost productivity and creativity, plus expanded AI capabilities. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/meta-expands-revenue-push/

data.title: Kimi K2.5 Model Achieves Top Scores in Global Open Source Evaluations
data.description:
Kimi has announced the release of its first-generation open-source model, Kimi K2.5, through its official WeChat account. According to Foresight News, Kimi K2.5 has achieved the highest scores among global open-source models in various agent evaluations, including HLE (Human Last Examination), BrowseComp, and DeepSearchQA.

The K2.5 model is designed with a native multimodal architecture, supporting both visual and text inputs. It integrates capabilities such as visual understanding and reasoning, programming, and agent functionalities into a single model. The release and open-sourcing of the Kimi K2.5 model introduce new capabilities in visual comprehension, coding, and agent clustering.

data.title: Crypto Address Places $23,000 Bet on Federal Reserve Interest Rate Decision
data.description: A newly established cryptocurrency address has placed a $23,000 wager on the potential outcomes of the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision scheduled for January 28. According to NS3.AI, the bet encompasses three possible scenarios: an interest rate hike of 25 basis points or more, a rate cut of 25 basis points, and a rate cut of 50 basis points or more. Should any of these scenarios materialize, the potential profits could range from $1.27 million to $5.64 million.

data.title: Binance: The Binance Alpha airdrop can be claimed at 17:00 today. The airdrop threshold is 233 Alpha points.
data.description: Binance announced that the Binance Alpha airdrop will be available today at 17:00 (UTC+8). Users holding at least 233 Binance Alpha Credits are eligible to claim the tokens. It's on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is depleted or the event ends. Further details will be announced separately. Please follow Binance's official channels for the latest updates on the specific airdrop tokens.

data.title: An address spent $23,000 betting on extreme volatility in the Federal Reserve's interest rate decision, with a potential profit of up to $5.64 million.
data.description: Lookonchain posted on its X platform that the market expects the Federal Reserve to keep interest rates unchanged on January 28th. Against this backdrop, a newly created address spends $23,000 to bet on three extreme scenarios: a 25 basis point or greater rate hike, a 25 basis point or greater rate cut, and a 50 basis point or greater rate cut. If any of these scenarios occur, the address will profit over $1.27 million, over $2.01 million, or up to $5.64 million respectively.

data.title: Silver ‘Just Starting’ To Break Out Amid Massive Surge in Physical Demand, Says Gold Strategist
data.description:
A Swiss financier and precious metals advocate says silver’s major breakout is just beginning. In a new market update, the founder of Matterhorn Asset Management, Egon von Greyerz, says silver is going through a fundamental change.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/27/silver-just-starting-to-break-out-amid-massive-surge-in-physical-demand-says-gold-strategist

data.title: Spot gold has rebounded to $5,100, rising 1.83% on the day.
data.description: Spot gold has climbed above $5,100 per ounce, up 1.83% on the day. (Jinshi)

data.title: Silver Market Anticipated to Enter Bull Phase by 2026
data.description: OCBC's forex strategist Christopher Wong forecasts a structural bull market for silver beginning in 2026. According to NS3.AI, this prediction is based on resilient industrial demand and a constrained physical supply. The bank has significantly increased its silver price target for the first quarter of 2026 from $76 to $117 per ounce. This upward adjustment is attributed to regulatory changes, ongoing supply inelasticity, and stronger-than-anticipated industrial demand.

data.title: Ethereum's Fusaka Upgrade Faces Challenges with Increased Blob Capacity
data.description: Ethereum's recent Fusaka upgrade has significantly increased the data capacity for layer 2 blobs by eight times. According to NS3.AI, research indicates that blocks with higher blob counts are more prone to failure, leading to network strain. Studies conducted by MigaLabs and PandaOps have identified issues such as validator timing strategies that contribute to block failures, even though the average blob counts have decreased. In response, developers are contemplating a minor update aimed at enhancing data propagation efficiency before considering any further increases in blob capacity.

data.title: Tether surpasses Greece, Qatar, and Australia to become one of the world's top 30 gold holders.
data.description: Stablecoin issuer Tether officially announced that, according to data from the International Monetary Fund (IMF) and a Jefferies report, Tether has entered the ranks of the world's top 30 gold holders, surpassing countries such as Greece, Qatar, and Australia. It is reported that as of the end of the fourth quarter of 2025, Tether's total physical gold reserves reached 520,089.350 ounces, with a total of 520,089.3 XAUT tokens in circulation, accounting for approximately 60% of the total supply of gold-backed stablecoins.

data.title: Spot Silver Surges Over $8, Reaches $112 Per Ounce
data.description: Spot silver prices have surged by more than $8 within the day, climbing back to $112 per ounce. According to Odaily, this marks an 8% increase in its daily performance.

data.title: Fundstrat’s Tom Lee Predicts Bitcoin, Ethereum Surge Once Metals Rally Fades
data.description:
Fundstrat managing partner Tom Lee believes Bitcoin and Ether are poised to play catch-up once the blistering rally in gold and silver begins to cool.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/fundstrats-tom-lee-predicts-bitcoin-ethereum-surge-once-metals-rally-fades/

data.title: OCBC Bank: Silver enters a structural bull market; significantly raises Q1 2026 target price to $117.
data.description: Christopher Wong, FX strategist at OCBC Group Research, noted in a research report that silver is poised for a structural bull market in 2026, benefiting from multiple factors including resilient industrial demand. “Its price action validates our previous medium-term assessment – ​​silver prices rose as expected, supported by tight physical supply, robust industrial demand, and a favorable macroeconomic environment,” the strategist stated. He added, “The speed and magnitude of this rally exceeded expectations, primarily driven by changes in regulatory policy, continued supply inelasticity, and stronger-than-expected industrial demand.” OCBC has significantly raised its Q1 2026 silver price forecast from $76/oz to $117/oz. (Jinshi)

data.title: Whale Investor Faces Losses After Leveraged Crypto Short Positions
data.description:
A prominent whale investor, known for rapid trading shifts, has incurred significant losses after taking leveraged short positions in Bitcoin and Ethereum. According to ChainCatcher, the investor, identified by the address 0x50b30, utilized a 20x leverage to short 684.54 BTC at an average price of $87,428.6, resulting in an unrealized loss of $700,000. Additionally, the investor employed a 25x leverage to short 10,112.2 ETH at an average price of $2,898.77, leading to an unrealized loss of $339,000.

This investor is recognized for swiftly reversing positions, often executing large-scale trades immediately after closing previous ones.

data.title: OpenAI's Chief Information Security Officer Matt Knight to Depart
data.description: OpenAI's Chief Information Security Officer, Matt Knight, has announced his upcoming departure from the company. According to Foresight News, Knight played a pivotal role in leading the development of security products during his tenure, culminating in the release of Aardvark.
